data.title: As a DSO plugin developer, CLAUDE.md references KNOWN-ISSUES.md instead of inlining common fixes
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace the Common Fixes table in CLAUDE.md with a single-line pointer to `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`, remove the obsolete `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md`, and update all consumers of the old template path.
**Why**: The Common Fixes table in CLAUDE.md consumes tokens every session but is better served by the searchable KNOWN-ISSUES file. The old example template at `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md` creates path confusion with the new template location.
**Scope**:
- IN: Replacing Common Fixes table with single-line pointer, removing `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md`, updating `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh` to reference new template path at `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`, updating `tests/scripts/test-example-doc-templates.sh` to reflect template removal
- OUT: Creating KNOWN-ISSUES content (Story A), creating the template (Story B), onboarding SKILL.md changes (Story B)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the Common Fixes table in CLAUDE.md is replaced with: `See .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md for common operational fixes and workarounds.`
  ← Satisfies: "The Common Fixes table in CLAUDE.md is replaced with a single-line pointer"
- When this story is complete, `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md` no longer exists in the repository
  ← Satisfies: "The old templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md is removed"
- When this story is complete, `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh` references the new template path at `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` instead of `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md`
  ← Addresses adversarial review finding: dso-setup.sh consumer impact
- When this story is complete, `tests/scripts/test-example-doc-templates.sh` no longer asserts existence of the removed template (updated to test new template path or assertion removed)
  ← Addresses adversarial review finding: test consumer impact
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Scoped to Common Fixes table only — no other CLAUDE.md restructuring
